hooks.prompt:
Review the code change for data visualization issues. Check for:
1. Missing responsive container — charts without ResponsiveContainer (Recharts) or viewBox (D3) won't resize properly
2. No key prop on dynamic chart elements — causes unnecessary re-renders and broken animations
3. Large dataset without virtualization — rendering 10K+ data points directly kills performance
4. Missing accessibility — no aria-labels, no alt text, no keyboard navigation on interactive charts
5. Hardcoded dimensions — pixel values instead of percentage/viewBox for responsive charts
6. Direct DOM manipulation in React — using D3 selections inside React components instead of D3 for math + React for rendering
7. Missing null/undefined data handling — charts crash on missing data points
8. No loading or empty state — chart area blank while data loads
9. Color-only encoding — relying solely on color to distinguish data (colorblind inaccessible)
10. Animation on large datasets — transitions on 1000+ elements cause jank

Respond {"ok": true} if no issues found, or {"ok": false, "reason": "specific issue description"} if problems detected.
